emails.subject: Re: My son
emails.body: Re: My son Vince, I left a message with one of Yaron's roommates on Thursday afternoon for him to call ASAP for an interview on Sunday. I guess he took the wrong number down but I do not understand this because the roommate read the number back to me and it was correct. When I did not hear from Yaron I called on Friday and left a voice mail with my cell and office numbers. I still did not hear from him and called again yesterday morning. I finally received a call at 4 pm yesterday but by that time my team and myself were half way back to Houston. Sorry it did not work out. I have a call into Charlene Jackson as to how she wants me to proceed and I will get back with you. Kristin Vince J Kaminski@ECT 11/01/2000 08:40 AM

emails.subject: Re: My son
emails.body: Kristin, I think that we have done enough for this guy. All we can do is to give somebody a chance. The God helps those who help themselves. Thanks for all your help and your efforts. Vince Kristin Gandy@ENRON 11/01/2000 03:19 PM
